name: reconstruction_femnist_seed42_v1
purpose: Create the public LEAF FEMNIST input used by the CUDA seed-42 reconstruction screen; never a paper-reproduction input claim.

preprocess.selected_clients: 200 writers selected with seed 42 from the complete valid LEAF writer pool

parameter_provenance.leaf_revision: REPO_EXISTING: CUDA reconstruction screening evidence log
parameter_provenance.selected_clients: USER_SPECIFIED seeded-random subject selection; not manuscript-specified
parameter_provenance.pillow_compatibility_patch: SOURCE_TRACEABLE_COMPATIBILITY_FIX: replace deprecated Image.ANTIALIAS with its Pillow-10 equivalent Image.Resampling.LANCZOS

limitations: The manuscript identifies FEMNIST but does not establish this LEAF revision, preprocessing, client selection, or train fraction as its paper input.
Output from this manifest is RECONSTRUCTION_INPUT_ONLY and may only support reconstruction-screening results.
